name: @org-os/egregore-opencode-adapter
description: OpenCode adapter for egregore — AI memory for /-command based interfaces

scripts.demo: node -e "const {EgregoreOpencodeAdapter} = require('./opencode-to-egregore'); const a = new EgregoreOpencodeAdapter({debug:true}); console.log('Adapter ready:', a.memoryRepo)"
